title: microstachys acalyphoides
intro:
Microstachys acalyphoides, commonly known as the "Wild Guanabani", is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Microstachys acalyphoides include its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects, which may contribute to its therapeutic actions in reducing fever and alleviating pain. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.

side_effects: Microstachys acalyphoides can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and vomiting, due to the plant's high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged consumption of the plant can also lead to kidney damage and liver failure, as the body struggles to process the plant's toxic alkaloids.
